zh.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure於大約1256年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德。她於從1279年1月20日到1281年11月29日與Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont在英國英格蘭德比夏爾艾金頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1310年在英國享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure于大约1256年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德。她于从1279年1月20日到1281年11月29日与Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont在英国英格兰德比夏爾艾金頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1310年在英国享年55岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Genoure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Jenner
meanings: English: occupational name for a designer or engineer, from Middle English enginour ‘engineer, maker or designer of military machines’, Old French engigneor, enginior (a derivative of engaigne ‘cunning, ingenuity, stratagem, device’). Engineers in the Middle Ages were primarily designers and builders of military machines, although in peacetime they might turn their hands to architecture and other more pacific functions. In the 12th century ingeniator was used to denote someone who combined the duties of master mason and architect. Ailnoth ingeniator, a military architect, was surveyor of the king's buildings at Westminster and the Tower in 1157, and was in charge of building operations at Windsor 1166–73. He repaired Westminster Abbey after a fire and superintended the destruction of the castles of Framlingham and Walton.

German: from the Latin personal name Januarius (see Janvier ). Jänner is a South German word for ‘January’, and so it is possible that this is one of the surnames acquired from words denoting months of the year, for example by converts who had been baptized in that month, people who were born or baptized in that month, or people whose taxes were due in January.

nameMeanings.name: Elenore

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure was born about 1256, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. She married Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont from 20 January 1279 to 29 November 1281, in Eckington, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1310, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure est née environ 1256, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont du 20 janvier 1279 au 29 novembre 1281, à Eckington, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1310, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure wurde um 1256 in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat von 20. Januar 1279 bis 29. November 1281 in Eckington, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1310 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure è nata il circa 1256 nel Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont da 20 gennaio 1279 a 29 novembre 1281, nel Eckington, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1310, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoureは約1256年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた。から1279年1月20日まで1281年11月29日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアエクイントンでRobert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1310年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure(은)는 대략 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1279년 1월 20일부터 1281년 11월 29일까지 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 킨그턴에서 Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1310년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont de 20 de janeiro de 1279 a 29 de novembro de 1281, em Eckington, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1310, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elenore de Genoure родилась около 1256 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert V D'Estouteville, sgr d’estouteville et de valmont с 20 января 1279 по 29 ноября 1281 в местности эккингтон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1310 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.
